title: Property Development I
outline: This course aims to develop an understanding of: the consideration of client/developer motivation and needs; the client briefing process; the theory of construction cost planning and cost control as it relates to the client/developer; design economics; rel iability of cost data; and communication during the design phase of a development. DEPARTMENTS IN THE FACULTY AND COURSES OFFERED 125
lecture_times: See departmental timetable and official class schedule.
dp_requirements: Please refer to the official course handout document for detailed information regarding the DP requirements for this course.
assessment: Please refer to the official course handout document regarding the assessment criteria for this course.
